# Model definition for ClimSim regression task
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class ResidualBlock(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, dim):
        super(ResidualBlock, self).__init__()
        self.linear1 = nn.Linear(dim, dim)
        self.bn1 = nn.BatchNorm1d(dim)
        self.relu = nn.ReLU()
        self.linear2 = nn.Linear(dim, dim)
        self.bn2 = nn.BatchNorm1d(dim)
        
    def forward(self, x):
        identity = x
        out = self.linear1(x)
        out = self.bn1(out)
        out = self.relu(out)
        out = self.linear2(out)
        out = self.bn2(out)
        out += identity  # Residual connection
        out = self.relu(out)
        return out

class SpecializedMLP(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dim=124, output_dim=128, hidden_dims=[512, 512, 256]):
        super(SpecializedMLP, self).__init__()
        
        # Shared feature extractor
        shared_layers = []
        shared_layers.append(nn.Linear(input_dim, hidden_dims[0]))
        shared_layers.append(nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dims[0]))
        shared_layers.append(nn.ReLU())
        shared_layers.append(nn.Dropout(0.1))
        
        # Add residual blocks for shared representation
        for i in range(len(hidden_dims)-1):
            shared_layers.append(ResidualBlock(hidden_dims[0]))
        
        self.shared_network = nn.Sequential(*shared_layers)
        
        # Separate heads for different output types
        # Temperature tendency (60 values)
        self.temp_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dims[0], 256),
            nn.BatchNorm1d(256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 60)
        )
        
        # Humidity tendency (60 values)
        self.humid_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dims[0], 256),
            nn.BatchNorm1d(256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 60)
        )
        
        # Combined radiation and precipitation components (8 scalars)
        self.rad_precip_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dims[0], 128),
            nn.BatchNorm1d(128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 8)
        )
    
    def forward(self, x):
        shared_features = self.shared_network(x)
        
        temp_out = self.temp_head(shared_features)
        humid_out = self.humid_head(shared_features)
        rad_precip_out = self.rad_precip_head(shared_features)
        
        # Concatenate all outputs
        output = torch.cat([temp_out, humid_out, rad_precip_out], dim=1)
        
        return output
